titleStmt.title: SII 15.56: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 56. (B.K. No. 68 of 1929-30.) TĀḶĪKŌṬI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar set up near the gateway of the fort.
The epigraph is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Krōdhi, Vaiśākha śu. 13, Monday, corresponding to 1184 A.D., April 25. The weekday, however, was Wednesday.

It records the gifts of land, house-site, shop, gardens, oilmill, incomes from toll on certain articles of sale, and one gadyāṇa each from all the villages in the district of Hagariṭage-300, made by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Viruparasa. The gifts were entrusted into the hands of Vīra-Dāsa for conducting worship and offerings on behalf of the Gaṇas in the temple of Vīra-Baysēśvara and for maintaining a Gaṇa-maṭha. These Gaṇas of Śaiva traditions, who seem to have belonged to the new school of Śaivism, are described as having established the glory of the god Śiva by destroying the Buddhist and Jaina creeds, vanquishing the advocates of the rival faiths at Pariyaḷige, Aṇilevāḍa, Uṇukallu, Sampagāvi, Abbalūru, Māruḍige, Aṇampūru, Karahāḍa, Kembāvi, Bammukūru and other places in distant lands, demolishing the Jaina temples and enthroning Śivaliṅgas with supreme valour. Mention is made of Tāḷiyakōṭe (modern Tāḷikōṭi) while describing the boundaries of the gift land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: At the top of the inscription is cut the Kannada numeral 7 to indicate The pillars containing the earlier parts of the inscription on six sides are missing.
div.p:
diṁ muṟivaruṁ parasamaya girivajradaṁḍaruṁ jagadaluddaṁ
ḍaruṁ jinasamayavanadahanadāvānaḷaruṁ munidargge
hāḷāhaḷaruṁ bauddhasamayavidhvaṁsanapravīṇaruṁ bage
yalu jāṇaruṁ Anyasamayigaḷa bennabāranettuvaruṁ sa
ṇasuvara nettaraṁ maruḷgaḷiṁ kuḍisuvaruṁ parasameya
gharaṭṭaruṁ vīrakupparavaṭṭaruṁ kālana nālageyaṁ kīḷvaruṁ
bāriyaṁ kūradarggīvaruṁ naṁjanaṁjaduṁbaruṁ
ṟasi mārkkoḷvaruṁ bahuvidha niṣṭāvaśīkṟita ja
ruṁ Asaṁkhyātasaṁkhyābhidhēya mahā
parasamaya sarasijātasamūhamadakarigaḷaṁ
huvidhaniṣṭheyiṁ haranaṁ pariksi bhavamanaṁtarsi parasama
maṁ saṁharsi jaramaṁ māṁkarisuvuddaṁḍaruṁ
le gaṁḍaruṁ pariyaḷige Aṇilevāḍa Uṇukallu saṁ
pagāvi Abbalūru māruḍige Aṇaṁporu karahāḍa keṁ
bāvi bammukūru modalāgi Anantadēśadēśāntaradalidi
rāda parasamayigaḷaṁ paḍalpaḍsi lōkamanākaṁpaṁ go

ḷi�basadigaḷaṁ hosadu mukki śivaliṁgasiṁhāsanamaṁ
ṇgoḷsi calamaṁ meṟedu dhīraroḷu neṟedu svarggamartya
pātāḷadoḷanaṁgāriya hemmeymaṁ tamma bhri
tyācārada tommeymaṁ taḷadalikki tōrppanta tōrida purāta
nanūtanarenisida Asaṁkhyātagaṇaṁgaḷe nāmādisa
mastapraśastisahitaṁ . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakravartti tribhu
vanamalla vīrasōmēśvaradēvavarṣada 3 neya krōdhi saṁvatsa
rada vaiśākha suddha 13 sōmavāradaṁdu śrī vīra baysēśva
ra dēvargge Aṁgabhōga caitra paitra sakalagaṇaṁgaḷa dēvatārccane
gaḷaṁ māḷpaṁtāgi śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ virupa
rasadēvaru vīradāsaṁge gaṇamaṭhavāgi koṭṭa keyi tāḷiya
kōṭeyiṁ baḍagalu baṁmanahaḷḷiyiṁ mūḍalu kāreganūri
ge hōdadāriyiṁ Uppuvaḷḷa teṁkaṇasīmeyāgi baḍagalu
goṭṭa kaṁḍikeyiṁdiḷidu baṁda haḷḷa mēreyāgi māṇikēśva
rada kōlalu cadurasa mattaru 100 dēvara pauḷiyiṁ saṁdsi
hoṟage teṁkalaramaneya bīdi mēreyāgi nīḷahasta 27 Agala ha
sta 20 ra nivēśaṇa 1 Aṁgaḍi 1 Ūriṁ mūḍalu tōṭa 1 ḍōṇiyiṁ

paḍuvalu tōṭa 1 Antu tōṭa 2 dēvamāna hoṁge jōḷa mā 2 nuṇba
na hoṁge māna 1 dēvara neṁdādīvigege gāṇa 1 mēlāda gāṇaṁga
ḷalu Eṇne soṭige 1 hoṁge māṟidalli Aḍake 5 Ele hēṟiṁge 50 dē
vara kāṇike hagariṭage mūnūṟaṟoḷage Ūrūralu gadyāṇa
1 Intinitakkaṁ vīradāsana vaṁśa vaijavve bāgeyanāyaka dēvarggaṁ
bhaktarggaṁ Aṁji besakeyvaru Ā maṭhada heggaḍe saṁkayyaṁge dēva
keyyoḷage matteru 10 pauḷiyoḷage nīḷahasta 12 A
galahasta 5 ṟa nivēśaṇa 1 kāṇikeyoḷage Ūru 2 E
ntentu dēvarige vrittighanavāgalantante daśavaṁda saṁkayyaṁge .
cāviseṭṭige mattaru 5
Digital edition of SII 15.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
